top_signals.title: Oil Gains, Asian Stocks Fall as US Strikes Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil climbed and stocks fell after US forces launched fresh strikes on Iran, reviving geopolitical risks at a time when markets are already grappling with a selloff in richly valued technology stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
